name: datavidence-healthanalysis
description: Domain plugin for reproducible biostatistics / health-data analysis with R. 21 thin-verb skills across health (phenotype-gate, map-clinical-codes, design-indicator, scaffold-reporting), the STRATOS analysis core (frame-study, run-ida, validate-assumptions, assess-missingness, numeric-check, specify-regression, specify-sensitivity-plan, review-outliers, big-data-triage, draft-diagram), data plumbing (onboard-data, validate-data-contract), a method-audit panel, and opt-in modules (dag-causal, prediction-validation, survey-design, spatial). Fail-open governance hooks (guard_data_export, notation_check) and reviewer subagents (methodologist, statistician, reporting-reviewer). Operationalizes datavidence-template-project policies; orthogonal to psotobverse-utils (generic workflow).
